nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pied honeyeater
nodes.summary: Pied honeyeater（Pied honeyeater，学名 Certhionyx variegatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The pied honeyeater is found in the arid and semi-arid zones, on the sandhills of inland plains, inland ranges, granite outcrops, and also on the coastal sandhills of Western Australia. It frequents shrublands and woodlands with the former dominated by emu bush (Eremophila spp.) and grevilleas, and the latter predominantly by mulga. Habitat may include a scattering of river red gum (Eucalyptus camaldulensis) along watercourses, and Casuarina and Myoporum along dry watercourses and dry salt-lakes. Pied honeyeaters also inhabit spinifex-dominated grasslands within scattered areas of mulga (Acacia aneura), Casuarina, and bloodwood (Corymbia terminalis).Chapman, G., (2014) Pers
